basics.name: Dinh Phu Nguyen
basics.label: Back-end Software Engineer
basics.summary: Innovative and detail-oriented Backend Developer with more than 5 years of experience in Java development and RESTful API design. Skilled at creating systems that not only solve current problems but are thoughtfully designed for future growth and easy maintenance. Known for reducing operational overhead and development time through clean architecture and scalable solutions. A strong team contributor who brings both technical expertise and a mindset focused on long-term efficiency. Guided by the principle: "Don't let today's work steal your time in the future."

work.name: FPT Corporation
work.summary: A Customer Data Platform (CDP) for marketing automation used by the client’s marketing team to manage customers, contact history, users and activities.
highlights: Design and organize the system to solve the business problems.
Continuously improve the system and team’s performance.
Improve the Git workflow, convention and CI/CD.
